script: echo '===== Verify port 3998 is free =====' && ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep ':3998 ' || echo '  port 3998 free'; echo; echo '===== Run make-mso-claude-bot.sh =====' && bash /home/azureuser/make-mso-claude-bot.sh --short jesus-reyes --full 'Jesus Reyes' --title 'RPS Admin PSG' --upn jesusr@musculoskeletalmso.com --port 3998 --app-id e6e0f8dd-411a-485d-8d93-39149cb84204 --teams-catalog 2c4a8184-13db-4d42-a65e-5def7414ce2c --bot-name 'Jesus R Claude' 2>&1 | tail -40; echo; echo '===== Verify services =====' && systemctl is-active jesus-reyes-bot.service jesus-reyes-responder.service 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Verify nginx route =====' && grep -A 1 'jesus-reyes' /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/mskai-bot 2>&1 | head -6; echo; echo '===== End-to-end BF token test =====' && SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name jesus-reyes-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c/oauth2/v2.0/token' --data-urlencode 'client_id=e6e0f8dd-411a-485d-8d93-39149cb84204' --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default' | jq '{has_token: (.access_token != null), error}'
